rejectionPresets.title: Rejection Reason Presets
rejectionPresets.description: Manage reason templates available for one-click selection in the checkout rejection modal. System default presets (isDefault=true) cannot be deleted.
rejectionPresets.cannotDeleteDefault: System default presets cannot be deleted
rejectionPresets.empty: No rejection presets registered. Click 'Add preset' to register a new one.

form.descriptionCreate: Admin-registered presets are classified as user-defined and can be deleted at any time.
form.descriptionEdit: Edit preset information. Changes take effect immediately.
form.templateField: Body (optional — auto-fills the textarea when selected)
form.templatePlaceholder: e.g. This equipment is scheduled for calibration; checkout is restricted. Please re-apply after calibration is complete.
form.discardDescription: Your unsaved changes will be lost.

delete.title: Delete rejection preset
delete.description: Delete the '{label}' preset. This action cannot be undone and does not affect rejection flows already in progress.
